category_sources: source_facts.description says it checks projects for contributor friction; official GitHub README says Flint checks common sources of contributor friction: https://github.com/pengwynn/flint
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README uses display name `Flint`; Homebrew package name is `flint-checker` to avoid package-name collision: https://github.com/pengwynn/flint
docs_sources: No separate official docs site found; official GitHub README is the primary usage/documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify a Go CLI that checks contributor-facing project files and structure: https://github.com/pengwynn/flint
